name: Mold Inspection & Testing (MI&T)
description: Unbiased mold inspection and testing services for Austin, San Antonio, and surrounding areas with a strict code of ethics.

name: Mold Inspection Sciences of Texas
description: Provides mold inspection and testing services for homes and workplaces across multiple Texas cities including Austin, Dallas, Fort Worth, San Antonio, and Houston.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Josie Williams showed a ton of professionalism and just genuine kindness, was truly concerned with us
Kelvin was so informative and thorough. He talked us through everything and felt like he actually cared
Super attentive, explained everything in detail and was super helpful and kind
Roger did a wonderful and thorough job. He educated us and had wonderful customer service

sentiment.summary: Mold Inspection Sciences of Texas has an exceptional reputation with universally positive reviews praising staff professionalism, thorough inspections, genuine care for clients, and excellent customer service across all team members.

name: Texas Mold Consultants
description: TDLR licensed independent mold inspection company providing mold assessment and testing services to Austin and Central Texas areas for over 33 years.
